title: Joeji's Kitchen Large Aluminium Tagine Dish - Moroccan Tajine Dish 28 cm - Moroccan Tajine Induction Gas and Ceramic Glass
features: Tagine Cooking Pot with Lid - This 28cm large cooking pot comes with a self-basting conical lid to lock heat & moisture in. This allows meat, veggies, & spices in the Morrocan tagine pot to turn into a perfectly moist dish with concentrated flavours.

Long Service Life - Our Morrocan cooking pot is a lot more durable than clay cooking pots which are prone to cracking & breakage. Its shatterproof aluminium build with non-stick coating is resistant to stains, scratches, & dents for long term use.

Modern Take on Moroccan Tagine - Unlike traditional tagines made of clay, our cooking pots do not need to be pre-seasoned with oil and won't burn food quickly when left unattended. Enables easy one pot cooking for savoury meat stews, soup, & more.

Convenient Use - While a clay tagine & biryani cooking pot can crack under high temperature, our large tagine pot's induction compatible base enables quick even heat distribution suitable for all cooktops. Built with cool-touch handles to prevent scalding. "

100% Guarantee - We offer a 100% guarantee on our big cooking pot, tagine pot large, chicken brick terracotta large, Moroccan plant pot, tagine spices & all products. If you're not satisfied with any tagine pot Moroccan or any item please contact us.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 GAS STOVES 2 INDUCTION STOVES 3 ELECTRIC STOVES MORE REASONS TO LOVE THIS PRODUCT MUST-HAVE COOKWARE Let the tagine help you treat your family to tender, flavour-rich dishes. Best for savoury meat stews. NEWER & BETTER Unlike traditional clay pots that still need to be pre-seasoned, this modern tagine won't crack nor burn dishes quickly. GREAT FOR ALL COOKTOPS Suitable for use with all cooktops including induction, gas, halogen, ceramic, and electric stoves. EASY TO MAINTAIN Offers easy cleanups with its resistance to staining, scratches, and dents. Its non-stick surface prevents tough-to-scrub residue. Can this go in the oven? Yes, its silicone handles are heat resistant for up to 160 °C. The lid I received has a hole on the side. Is this normal or did I receive a faulty product? This hole is there to prevent too much pressure build up and to vent excess steam. This will not affect the tagine's function of retaining moisture inside. How heavy is this tagine? This tagine weighs 2.1kg with its lid.
